sourceMovie.title: Splitsville
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Splitsville (2025) as a comedy theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The comedy and romance blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Wedding Crashers
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Splitsville clicked for you, Wedding Crashers (2005) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy and romance, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Splitsville?
faq.answer: Try Wedding Crashers, Sex and the City, Stepmom—each shares DNA with Splitsville while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Splitsville?
faq.answer: Splitsville (2025) is best described as Comedy, Romance. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Splitsville worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.3/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this comedy lane.
